items.phrase: One of the most memorable moments in my life was …
items.translation: Один из самых запоминающихся моментов в моей жизни — это …
items.example: One of the most memorable moments in my life was my trip to Japan.

items.phrase: It all started one day when …
items.example: It all started one day when I was at work and my brother called.
I was so embarrassed when I fell in front of everyone.
The next thing I knew, I was on the floor.
I had absolutely no idea what was happening.
All of a sudden, the lights went out.
In the end, everything worked out fine.

items.phrase: That day is one of my happiest memories.
items.translation: Этот день — один из моих самых счастливых воспоминаний.
items.example: That weekend is one of my happiest memories.
